selections.name: Mailata
selections.reason: Excellent fresh record and maps well from a neutral draw. Strong speed figures from last preparation.

selections.name: Jambalaya
selections.reason: Consistent form and gets a major advantage from the inside barrier. Carries a competitive weight.

selections.name: African Daisy
selections.reason: Class drop here and gets a favorable inside draw. Capable of producing a high rating on her best day.

selections.name: Flightcrew
selections.reason: Pace factor with solid recent figures, though the wide draw is a slight concern.

danger_horse.name: Zaragoza
danger_horse.reason: Solid recent form and capable of finishing strongly if the pace is hot.

selections.name: Unleeshing
selections.reason: Strong recent win and backed it up with a solid run in Group 3 company. Handles the trip well.

selections.name: O'sheamus
selections.reason: Progressive type carrying a light weight. Showed excellent form last preparation and maps perfectly.

selections.name: Iceman
selections.reason: Consistent performer with good late speed. Desperate for this trip and can handle the rise in grade.

selections.name: The Western Front
selections.reason: Honest type who stays well. Form is hard to fault and will be in the finish.

danger_horse.name: Nkosi
danger_horse.reason: Drawn perfectly and has the class to feature if he can bounce back to his best.

selections.name: By Choice
selections.reason: Classy filly who gets a great draw. Consistent high speed figures and will be hard to catch.

selections.name: Ciaron's Star
selections.reason: Impressive recent win and draws perfectly to get a soft run behind the speed.

selections.name: Pembrey
selections.reason: Strong debut winner who can bounce back from a slightly flat second-up run. Has plenty of upside.

selections.name: Hardanger
selections.reason: Consistent group form and will be running on strongly late.

danger_horse.name: Lumbini
danger_horse.reason: Drawn the inside and has the ability to upset if the pace sets up for her.

selections.name: Warwoven
selections.reason: Top figures and a clear class edge. The wide draw is a slight negative but his raw ability should overcome it.

selections.name: Central Europe
selections.reason: Excellent debut run and has plenty of upside. Expected to go close with natural improvement.

selections.name: Star Of Jamaica
selections.reason: Tough pace factor who will be in it for a long way despite the tricky draw.

selections.name: High Alert
selections.reason: Solid form lines and can figure in the exotics with the right run.

danger_horse.name: Outspan
danger_horse.reason: Drawn well and has shown enough ability to be a threat at odds.

selections.name: Vauban
selections.reason: Elite class runner with superior figures. Top weight is a factor but his class should prevail in this field.

selections.name: Just Fine
selections.reason: Excellent form and maps perfectly from the draw. Will be very hard to get past.

selections.name: Soul Of Spain
selections.reason: Strong figures and ready to peak third-up. Gets a great run from the inside gate.

selections.name: Wootton Verni
selections.reason: Consistent group performer who rarely runs a bad race. Must be included.

danger_horse.name: Valiant King
danger_horse.reason: Capable of a high rating on his day and can surprise if the pace is genuine.

selections.name: Flying For Fun
selections.reason: Inside draw is a major advantage here. Strong fresh record and maps to get the run of the race.

selections.name: Kerguelen
selections.reason: Top class sprinter who can overcome the wide gate. Highest peak figures in the field.

selections.name: La Fracas
selections.reason: Undefeated fresh and looks a big threat. Good draw and ready to fire.

selections.name: King's Secret
selections.reason: Good trials leading in and gets map favors from the low draw.

danger_horse.name: Signor Tortoni
danger_horse.reason: Racing very well recently and has a great draw to be competitive at odds.

selections.name: Sixties
selections.reason: Dominant figures and a clear class edge. The wide draw is the only concern but he is simply better than these.

selections.name: West Of Swindon
selections.reason: Good draw and ready to peak third-up. Drops in grade and will be right in the finish.

selections.name: Shangri La Boy
selections.reason: Classy on his day and can bounce back from a poor first-up run. Capable of high ratings.

selections.name: Panova
selections.reason: Consistent filly who will be running on late. Wide draw means she will need some luck.

danger_horse.name: Top Reward
danger_horse.reason: Drawn the inside and has the ability to feature if he gets the right splits.

selections.name: Manaal
selections.reason: Elite filly who gets the perfect draw. Top speed figures and looks primed to win.

selections.name: Lazzura
selections.reason: Classy mare who is ready to fire second-up. Strong figures and will be right in the finish.

selections.name: Savvy Hallie
selections.reason: Flying this preparation. The wide draw is a negative but her form is impossible to ignore.

selections.name: Verona Rose
selections.reason: Strong recent win and maps perfectly from the good draw. Genuine top-three prospect.

danger_horse.name: Ole Dancer
danger_horse.reason: Consistent performer who can figure if she gets luck from the wide gate.

selections.name: Militarize
selections.reason: Elite class runner who gets the perfect inside draw. Top consistent figures and is the one to beat.

selections.name: Globe
selections.reason: Has the highest peak figures in the field. The wide draw is a concern but he is a massive danger if he crosses.

selections.name: Cristal Clear
selections.reason: Carries a light weight and flies fresh. Great draw and can run a big race at odds.

selections.name: Enxuto
selections.reason: Consistent type with a good weight and draw. Will be competitive.

danger_horse.name: Lord Penman
danger_horse.reason: Strong recent win and has the class to measure up here despite the draw.

selections.name: Modella
selections.reason: Great draw and strong figures. Carries a good weight and maps to get the run of the race.

selections.name: Captain Furai
selections.reason: Consistent performer who maps perfectly from the low draw. Hard to hold out.

selections.name: Bandi's Boy
selections.reason: Classy gelding with a good draw. Capable of a high rating on his day.

selections.name: Eye Of The Fire
selections.reason: Strong recent form and makes his own luck. Will be in the finish.

danger_horse.name: Perfumist
danger_horse.reason: Classy mare who can overcome the wide draw if the pace is on.
